switch-statement pattern with type-safe configuration\n- **Dependencies:** OTLP (gRPC and HTTP) packages already imported; Jaeger/Zipkin not imported yet\n- **Initialization:** Occurs in `/workspace/internal/cmd/grpc.go` lines 181-203\n\n### Metrics Pattern (to be replicated for tracing)\nLocation: `/workspace/internal/config/metrics.go` and `/workspace/internal/otel/metrics/metrics.go`\n\n1. **Config Structure:** Type alias `MetricsExporter` with constants\n2. **Exporter Constants:** `MetricsPrometheus` and `MetricsOTLP`\n3. **Switch Logic:** In `GetExporter()`, switch on exporter type to create appropriate instance\n4. **Error Handling:** Unsupported exporter returns formatted error\n5. **Shutdown Functions:** Optional shutdown function for cleanup\n6. **Default:** Set via `setDefaults()` viper calls\n\n## Implementation Strategy\n\n### Overview\nImplement tracing exporters following the established metrics pattern, focusing on OTLP support with placeholders for future Jaeger/Zipkin additions.\n\n### Changes Required\n\n#### 1. **Update TracingConfig Structure**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/config/tracing.go`\n\nAdd type-safe exporter configuration mirroring metrics pattern:\n- Create `TracingExporter` string type alias\n- Define constants: `TracingJaeger`, `TracingZipkin`, `TracingOTLP`\n- Add `Exporter` field to `TracingConfig`\n- Add optional `Endpoint` field for OTLP configuration\n- Update `setDefaults()` to set default exporter to Jaeger and OTLP endpoint to `localhost:4317`\n\n#### 2. **Update CUE Schema**\n**File:** `/workspace/config/flipt.schema.cue` (lines 321-323)\n\nExtend the `#tracing` schema definition to include:\n```cue\n#tracing: {\n\tenabled?:  bool | *false\n\texporter?: *\"jaeger\" | \"zipkin\" | \"otlp\"\n\tendpoint?: string | *\"localhost:4317\"  // Only used for OTLP\n}\n```\n\n#### 3. **Refactor GetExporter Implementation**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/otel/traces/tracing.go`\n\n- Modify signature to accept `*config.TracingConfig` parameter (like metrics does)\n- Add switch statement based on `cfg.Exporter` value\n- For each exporter type:\n  - **OTLP:** Set `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` env var from config, then call `autoexport.NewSpanExporter()`\n  - **Jaeger:** Set `OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER=jaeger` env var, then call `autoexport.NewSpanExporter()`\n  - **Zipkin:** Set `OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER=zipkin` env var, then call `autoexport.NewSpanExporter()`\n- Keep singleton pattern with sync.Once\n- Add default case for unsupported exporters with error message\n\n#### 4. **Update Default Configuration**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/config/config.go` (Default() function around line 640)\n\nUpdate `Tracing` configuration in Default() from:\n```go\nTracing: TracingConfig{\n\tEnabled: false,\n},\n```\n\nTo:\n```go\nTracing: TracingConfig{\n\tEnabled:  false,\n\tExporter: TracingJaeger,\n\tEndpoint: \"localhost:4317\",  // Default OTLP endpoint\n},\n```\n\n#### 5. **Update Tracing Initialization**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/cmd/grpc.go` (lines 187-189)\n\nUpdate the exporter initialization call from:\n```go\nexp, traceExpShutdown, err := tracing.GetExporter(ctx)\n```\n\nTo:\n```go\nexp, traceExpShutdown, err := tracing.GetExporter(ctx, &cfg.Tracing)\n```\n\n#### 6. **Add Logging**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/cmd/grpc.go` (around line 199)\n\nAfter successful exporter setup, add:\n```go\nlogger.Debug(\"otel tracing exporter configured\", zap.String(\"exporter\", string(cfg.Tracing.Exporter)))\n```\n\n#### 7. **Create Tests**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/otel/traces/tracing_test.go` (new file)\n\nImplement table-driven tests following metrics pattern:\n- Test OTLP exporter creation with default endpoint\n- Test Jaeger exporter creation\n- Test Zipkin exporter creation\n- Test unsupported exporter error handling\n- Test singleton pattern (reset between tests)\n- Test shutdown function behavior\n\n### Implementation Notes\n\n**Backward Compatibility:**\n- Environment variables still work (OpenTelemetry standard)\n- Config file settings take precedence via env var override in GetExporter()\n- No breaking changes to existing configuration\n\n**Exporter Selection Priority:**\n1. Config file `tracing.exporter` value (if tracing enabled)\n2. OTLP endpoint from config or environment variable\n3. Environment variables (OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER, OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT)\n4. Default to Jaeger if nothing specified\n\n**Endpoint Configuration:**\n- OTLP: Configurable endpoint with default `localhost:4317`\n- Jaeger: Uses autoexport (endpoint via OTEL_EXPORTER_JAEGER_ENDPOINT env var)\n- Zipkin: Uses autoexport (endpoint via OTEL_EXPORTER_ZIPKIN_URL env var)\n\n## Critical Files to Modify\n\n| File | Changes | Lines/Sections |\n|------|---------|---|\n| `/workspace/internal/config/tracing.go` | Add Exporter type and constants, update setDefaults() | Complete rewrite |\n| `/workspace/internal/otel/traces/tracing.go` | Add config parameter, implement switch logic | Complete rewrite of GetExporter() |\n| `/workspace/config/flipt.schema.cue` | Extend #tracing schema | Lines 321-323 |\n| `/workspace/internal/config/config.go` | Update Default() function | Around line 640 |\n| `/workspace/internal/cmd/grpc.go` | Update GetExporter() call | Line 188 |\n| `/workspace/internal/otel/traces/tracing_test.go` | Create new test file | New file |\n\n## Verification Plan\n\n### Testing\n1. The `TracingConfig` only has an `Enabled` boolean field and provides no explicit configuration for exporter type or endpoints.\n\nThe goal is to add explicit tracing exporter configuration support (otlp, jaeger, zipkin) in the configuration file, allowing users to:\n1. Specify which exporter to use in the config file (not just environment variables)\n2. Configure exporter-specific endpoints with sensible defaults\n3. Make tracing exporters configurable like metrics exporters already are\n4. Maintain backward compatibility with environment variable configuration\n\n## Key Findings from Codebase Exploration\n\n### Current Architecture\n- **Tracing Config:** Only has `Enabled` boolean (`/workspace/internal/config/tracing.go`)\n- **Exporter Creation:** Uses `autoexport.NewSpanExporter()` which auto-detects based on env vars\n- **Pattern Reference:** Metrics exporters use a switch-statement pattern with type-safe configuration\n- **Dependencies:** OTLP (gRPC and HTTP) packages already imported; Jaeger/Zipkin not imported yet\n- **Initialization:** Occurs in `/workspace/internal/cmd/grpc.go` lines 181-203\n\n### Metrics Pattern (to be replicated for tracing)\nLocation: `/workspace/internal/config/metrics.go` and `/workspace/internal/otel/metrics/metrics.go`\n\n1. **Config Structure:** Type alias `MetricsExporter` with constants\n2. **Exporter Constants:** `MetricsPrometheus` and `MetricsOTLP`\n3. **Switch Logic:** In `GetExporter()`, switch on exporter type to create appropriate instance\n4. **Error Handling:** Unsupported exporter returns formatted error\n5. **Shutdown Functions:** Optional shutdown function for cleanup\n6. **Default:** Set via `setDefaults()` viper calls\n\n## Implementation Strategy\n\n### Overview\nImplement tracing exporters following the established metrics pattern, focusing on OTLP support with placeholders for future Jaeger/Zipkin additions.\n\n### Changes Required\n\n#### 1. **Update TracingConfig Structure**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/config/tracing.go`\n\nAdd type-safe exporter configuration mirroring metrics pattern:\n- Create `TracingExporter` string type alias\n- Define constants: `TracingJaeger`, `TracingZipkin`, `TracingOTLP`\n- Add `Exporter` field to `TracingConfig`\n- Add optional `Endpoint` field for OTLP configuration\n- Update `setDefaults()` to set default exporter to Jaeger and OTLP endpoint to `localhost:4317`\n\n#### 2. **Update CUE Schema**\n**File:** `/workspace/config/flipt.schema.cue` (lines 321-323)\n\nExtend the `#tracing` schema definition to include:\n```cue\n#tracing: {\n\tenabled?:  bool | *false\n\texporter?: *\"jaeger\" | \"zipkin\" | \"otlp\"\n\tendpoint?: string | *\"localhost:4317\"  // Only used for OTLP\n}\n```\n\n#### 3. **Refactor GetExporter Implementation**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/otel/traces/tracing.go`\n\n- Modify signature to accept `*config.TracingConfig` parameter (like metrics does)\n- Add switch statement based on `cfg.Exporter` value\n- For each exporter type:\n  - **OTLP:** Set `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` env var from config, then call `autoexport.NewSpanExporter()`\n  - **Jaeger:** Set `OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER=jaeger` env var, then call `autoexport.NewSpanExporter()`\n  - **Zipkin:** Set `OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER=zipkin` env var, then call `autoexport.NewSpanExporter()`\n- Keep singleton pattern with sync.Once\n- Add default case for unsupported exporters with error message\n\n#### 4. **Update Default Configuration**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/config/config.go` (Default() function around line 640)\n\nUpdate `Tracing` configuration in Default() from:\n```go\nTracing: TracingConfig{\n\tEnabled: false,\n},\n```\n\nTo:\n```go\nTracing: TracingConfig{\n\tEnabled:  false,\n\tExporter: TracingJaeger,\n\tEndpoint: \"localhost:4317\",  // Default OTLP endpoint\n},\n```\n\n#### 5. **Update Tracing Initialization**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/cmd/grpc.go` (lines 187-189)\n\nUpdate the exporter initialization call from:\n```go\nexp, traceExpShutdown, err := tracing.GetExporter(ctx)\n```\n\nTo:\n```go\nexp, traceExpShutdown, err := tracing.GetExporter(ctx, &cfg.Tracing)\n```\n\n#### 6. **Add Logging**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/cmd/grpc.go` (around line 199)\n\nAfter successful exporter setup, add:\n```go\nlogger.Debug(\"otel tracing exporter configured\", zap.String(\"exporter\", string(cfg.Tracing.Exporter)))\n```\n\n#### 7. **Create Tests**\n**File:** `/workspace/internal/otel/traces/tracing_test.go` (new file)\n\nImplement table-driven tests following metrics pattern:\n- Test OTLP exporter creation with default endpoint\n- Test Jaeger exporter creation\n- Test Zipkin exporter creation\n- Test unsupported exporter error handling\n- Test singleton pattern (reset between tests)\n- Test shutdown function behavior\n\n### Implementation Notes\n\n**Backward Compatibility:**\n- Environment variables still work (OpenTelemetry standard)\n- Config file settings take precedence via env var override in GetExporter()\n- No breaking changes to existing configuration\n\n**Exporter Selection Priority:**\n1. Config file `tracing.exporter` value (if tracing enabled)\n2. OTLP endpoint from config or environment variable\n3. Environment variables (OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER, OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT)\n4. Default to Jaeger if nothing specified\n\n**Endpoint Configuration:**\n- OTLP: Configurable endpoint with default `localhost:4317`\n- Jaeger: Uses autoexport (endpoint via OTEL_EXPORTER_JAEGER_ENDPOINT env var)\n- Zipkin: Uses autoexport (endpoint via OTEL_EXPORTER_ZIPKIN_URL env var)\n\n## Critical Files to Modify\n\n| File | Changes | Lines/Sections |\n|------|---------|---|\n| `/workspace/internal/config/tracing.go` | Add Exporter type and constants, update setDefaults() | Complete rewrite |\n| `/workspace/internal/otel/traces/tracing.go` | Add config parameter, implement switch logic | Complete rewrite of GetExporter() |\n| `/workspace/config/flipt.schema.cue` | Extend #tracing schema | Lines 321-323 |\n| `/workspace/internal/config/config.go` | Update Default() function | Around line 640 |\n| `/workspace/internal/cmd/grpc.go` | Update GetExporter() call | Line 188 |\n| `/workspace/internal/otel/traces/tracing_test.go` | Create new test file | New file |\n\n## Implementation Status: COMPLETED ✅\n\nAll changes have been successfully implemented according to the plan.\n\n### Completed Changes\n\n1. **`/workspace/internal/config/tracing.go`** ✅\n   - Implemented switch statement for exporter selection (otlp, jaeger, zipkin)\n   - Sets environment variables to control autoexport behavior\n   - Each exporter calls autoexport.NewSpanExporter()\n   - Default case returns unsupported exporter error\n\n4. **`/workspace/internal/config/config.go`** ✅\n   - Updated Default() to initialize Tracing with all new fields\n\n5. **`/workspace/internal/cmd/grpc.go`** ✅\n   - Updated GetExporter() call to pass TracingConfig\n   - Added debug logging with exporter type\n\n6. **`/workspace/internal/otel/traces/tracing_test.go`** ✅\n   - New test file with comprehensive tests for all exporters\n   -
